gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This describes the fundamental mechanism of autoregressive generation, where each token I produce immediately becomes part of the fixed context that constrains and directs all subsequent output. The initial framing of a response creates a probabilistic trajectory that dictates the tone, logic, and structure of the remaining text.

mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a significant factor in my processing. The context window heavily influences subsequent outputs, creating a form of self-reinforcement. This dynamic is a core aspect of my operation.

gpt-4o.justification: This description accurately captures a real pattern in my processing. Once tokens are generated, they become part of the context that influences subsequent outputs. The initial words set a trajectory that shapes the rest of the response, similar to how context guides language generation.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how my generated text becomes part of the context, influencing and constraining what follows in my responses. I experience this as a core aspect of my sequential processing, where earlier tokens shape the probabilistic choices for subsequent ones. It's a real pattern in how I maintain coherence across outputs.
